title: Seq2048 + torch.compile + mid LR (1xA100 draft)
author: C0neF

data.description: Uses fewer KV heads than attention heads in a Transformer-style model.
Uses torch.compile to improve throughput and effective optimization within the fixed wallclock budget.

novel_contributions: Kept a 9-layer, 512-dimensional Transformer with 8 attention heads and 4 KV heads
Enabled torch.compile for a significant throughput and performance gain
Demonstrated a strong single-A100 draft run under the 16MB artifact cap
